chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6396 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.27275/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Salman Yousuf, advocate holding brief for Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, advocate for the petitioner. Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
